creator: doug@safeport.com
text:
The package for firefox 54 does not run on a fresh install using: xorg-7.7_2 and xfce-4.12_1. Gets a segfault with an error saying sqlite3 is improperly installed. The problem appears to be dependency requirements:

      system              firefox
     png-1.6.23          png-1.6.29
     sqlite3-3.14.1_1    sqlite3-3.17.0

png is required by
        xcursorgen-1.0.6_1
        cairo-1.14.8,2
        gdk-pixbuf2-2.32.3_1
        argyllcms-1.9.2_1
        webp-0.5.2_1
        webkit2-gtk3-2.8.5_8
        openjpeg-2.1.2_1
        libgd-2.2.4,1
        poppler-0.50.0
        poppler-glib-0.50.0
        librsvg2-2.40.16
        xfce4-tumbler-0.1.31_5
        chromium-59.0.3071.104
        open-motif-2.3.7
        xpdf-3.04_7
        fltk-1.3.3_4
        tigervnc-1.7.1_1
        gstreamer1-plugins-png-1.8.0
        firefox-54.0,1

and sqlite3 Required by    :
        colord-1.2.12
        libsoup-2.52.2
        libsoup-gnome-2.52.2
        webkit2-gtk3-2.8.5_8
        nss-3.31
        py27-sqlite3-2.7.13_7
        pidgin-2.12.0
        subversion-1.9.5
        firefox-54.0,1

So it is not clear that building all of the above yields a working system as a good deal of these components are required by other things in xfce.
